chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No. D-4210 of 2024 Date Order with Signature of Judge(s) Priority 1. For hearing on Misc. No.4378/2025. 2. For order on office objection. 3. For hearing on Misc. No.18563/2024. 4. For hearing of main case. 24-03-2025 Mr. Tasaduq Nadeem, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Kashif Hanif, Advocate for the Applicant/Intervener. Mr. Sandeep Malani, A.A.G. Mr. Kashif Hanif states that after denial of ad-interim relief in the present petition the same petitioner filed suit No.-1471/2024 before the original civil jurisdiction of this Court and obtained ad-interim orders. Learned counsel further states that the same was unlawful and concealment from the concerned court. He further states that such observation shall be set with the concerned court at the relevant hearing. Be that as it may, learned counsel does not press this petition and the same is dismissed as withdrawn. Judge Judge Ayaz Gul
